zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Seton Governor of Berwick於1275年之前出生時，他的父親Sir Christopher Seton of Seton-3歲，母親Lady Christina De Brus25歲。他和Christian Cheyne至少有8個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1349年，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Seton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Seton Governor of Berwick was born before 1275, his father, Sir Christopher Seton of Seton, was -3 and his mother, Lady Christina De Brus, was 25. He had at least 8 sons and 1 daughter with Christian Cheyne. He died in 1349, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Seton Governor of Berwick est né avant 1275, son père, Sir Christopher Seton of Seton, avait -3 ans et sa mère, Lady Christina De Brus, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille avec Christian Cheyne. Il est décédé en 1349, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Seton Governor of Berwick vor 1275 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Christopher Seton of Seton -3 und seine Mutter Lady Christina De Brus 25. Er hatte mit Christian Cheyne mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1349 und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Seton Governor of Berwick è nato il prima del 1275, il suo padre, Sir Christopher Seton of Seton, aveva -3 anni e il suo madre, Lady Christina De Brus, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia con Christian Cheyne. Morì nel 1349, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Seton Governor of Berwickが1275年以前に生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Seton of Setonは-3歳，母Lady Christina De Brusは25歳であった。彼はChristian Cheyneとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1349年に死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Seton Governor of Berwick(이)가 1275년 이전에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Christopher Seton of Seton(은)는 -3세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Christina De Brus(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Christian Cheyne(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1349년 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Seton Governor of Berwick nasceu antes 1275, seu pai, Sir Christopher Seton of Seton, tinha -3 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christina De Brus, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha com Christian Cheyne. Ele faleceu em 1349, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Seton Governor of Berwick родился перед 1275 г., его отцу по имени Sir Christopher Seton of Seton было -3 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Christina De Brus, 25. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь от Christian Cheyne. Он умер в 1349 г. и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.
